TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: ryax sa tay 21 nqu tay 2, Jigme Khesar Namgyel Wangchuck, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1980) mrhuw Bhutan ta' misuw hya' ga Jigme Khesar Namgyel Wangchuck, aring ryax tay 14 squ byacing tay 12 sa kawas 2006 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'
S.PHON: rjax s~…ēa taj ** nqu taj *, *i…£me kńßes~…ēar nam…£jel waŇč ¶~ ®ńßu ¶~ ®k, s~…ēquliq na s~…ēezi Ē. (minńßtuw s~…ēa kawas~…ē taj ****) mrńßuw ő≤ńßutan ta Ē mis~…ēuw ńßja Ē …£a *i…£me kńßes~…ēar nam…£jel waŇč ¶~ ®ńßu ¶~ ®k, ariŇč rjax taj ** s~…ēqu ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč taj ** s~…ēa kawas~…ē **** l…£a, mus~…ēa Ē s~…ēpazjaŇč ő≤alaj ms~…ē Ērux kja la. ¶~ ®inkńßulan s~…ēa knita Ē s~…ēa ő≤rő≤iru Ē
S.FORM: ryax sa tay 21 nqu tay 2, Jigme Khesar Namgyel Wangchuck, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1980) mrhuw Bhutan ta' misuw hya' ga Jigme Khesar Namgyel Wangchuck, aring ryax tay 14 squ byacing tay 12 sa kawas 2006 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'
